heading: ***WINTER WEATHER ADVISORY TONIGHT INTO FRIDAY MIDDAY FROM THE ADIRONDACKS AND SOUTH OF I-89***Today
text: Sunshine mixing with increasing clouds. A rising chance of rain or sleet in the afternoon west and south of I-89. Highs in the mid 30s to mid 40s north to south. Winds light, becoming north up to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Any wintry mix of snow and sleet west and south of I-89, changing to mostly snow, north to Rt. 2. Total amounts 1 to 3 inches. Little if anything north of Rt. 2. Lows in the 20s. Winds light, becoming east near 10 mph.

heading: Friday
text: Periods of snow from Rt. 2 south early will end by mid-morning. Mostly cloudy, with some breaks of afternoon sun, mainly west of the Green Mountains. Highs in the 30s to low 40s. Winds becoming southeast up to 10 mph, increasing to 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph through the Champlain Valley and over the higher terrain.
